name: project
description: Monorepo starter with Next.js frontend and NestJS backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,yellow "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run start:dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,yellow "npm --prefix frontend run start" "npm --prefix backend run start:prod"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
